text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fans have piled into the stands to see today's big
G1 race, the Asahi Hai F.S.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder is determined to prove that she's
more than Maruzensky's "Successor," and will
reach the top herself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With this purpose in mind, she heads for the
track.
